sentences.translation: Čuo sam svog djeda kako kaže: «Najbolja su srednja stvar».
sentences.translationEn: My grandfather said: «The best of things is the middle way».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الِاعْتِدَالَ فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ هُوَ الأَفْضَلُ.
sentences.translation: To znači da je umjerenost u svemu najbolja.
sentences.translationEn: This means that moderation in all things is best.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَ الْوَلَدُ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْحَلْوَى فَمَرِضَ.
sentences.translation: Dječak je pojeo mnogo slatkiša i razbolio se.
sentences.translationEn: The boy ate too many sweets and got sick.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ أَنَّ الأَكْلَ الْمُعْتَدِلَ أَفْضَلُ لِصِحَّتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Naučio je da je umjerena ishrana bolja za njegovo zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: He learned that eating in moderation is better for his health.
